title: submit-bug fails when description contains backtick
description: When submitting a bug whose description contains a backtick character, the CLI raises an UnhandledPromiseRejection in the readline pipe and exits with status 0 instead of writing the request to disk.
reproduction_steps: At the description prompt, type a string containing a single backtick
Press enter and observe the crash
expected_behavior: The CLI accepts arbitrary string content (including backticks) in the description field and persists the request.
actual_behavior: The CLI crashes with UnhandledPromiseRejection and exits 0; no request is persisted.
error_messages: (node:12345) UnhandledPromiseRejectionWarning: SyntaxError: Invalid or unexpected token
user_impact: Operators cannot file any bug whose description contains a backtick — common when pasting code snippets.
